Subject: Facade bracket detail at Level 22 setback
Description: Drawing A-3014 Rev C shows facade bracket fixing to slab edge at the Level 22 setback. Structural drawings S-2207 show a step in the slab edge that conflicts with the bracket location. Please clarify fixing detail and confirm structural adequacy.

Subject: Riser door rating discrepancy
Description: Fire engineering report FER-003 Rev B specifies -/60/30 doors to electrical risers. Architectural door schedule shows -/60/60 rated doors at same locations. Please confirm required rating — affects door procurement lead time.
Response Summary: Confirmed -/60/30 per fire engineering report. Architectural schedule to be updated Rev D. No change to door procurement spec.

Subject: Existing services conflict in demolition zone
Description: Site investigation reveals 225mm stormwater main running through the C-Block demolition footprint that is not shown on survey or civil drawings. Pipe appears live and connected to oval drainage. Please advise on diversion route and confirm design intent for stormwater in this zone.
Impact on Time: Possible — 2 week delay if diversion required
